metrics.definition: Total outbound call attempts initiated in the selected filter scope.
Percent of call attempts that connected (not in non-connect statuses R, D, Q).
metrics.formula: connectionRate = connected / total * 100 where connected = SUM(status NOT IN ('R','D','Q'))

metrics.definition: Overall and by-insurance drop/fail rate using status F.
Hourly and weekday heatmap distribution of call attempts.
metrics.formula: hourlyCalls = COUNT(outboundmaster_detail.ID) GROUP BY DATEPART(HOUR, CallInTime), DATENAME(WEEKDAY, CallDate)

metrics.definition: Current queued/active calls snapshot based on pending master status.
Duration distribution percentiles and insurance aggregates from CDR durations.
metrics.formula: overall = AVG/MIN/MAX/PERCENTILE_CONT(Duration) over filtered cdrmaster rows

metrics.definition: Top insurances by dropped/failed call volume.
metrics.formula: dropped = SUM(status = 'F'), dropPct = dropped / COUNT(*) * 100 grouped by insurance

metrics.definition: Call status/source breakdown and share percentages.
Completion rate based on status C share among all statuses.
Cumulative attempt-stage funnel with drop-off between adjacent stages.
metrics.formula: stageCount(n+) = calls with attempts >= n; pctOfInitial = stageCount / stageCount(1+) * 100; dropOffPct = (prevStage - stageCount) / prevStage * 100

metrics.definition: Percent of calls that succeeded on first outbound detail attempt.
Top incomplete/failed steps based on statuses I, F, E, G, R.
metrics.formula: stepPct = stepCount / SUM(stepCount) * 100 where status IN ('I','F','E','G','R')

metrics.definition: Pending transcription queue depth and wait time within rolling lookback window.
metrics.formula: current = COUNT(*) WHERE status = 'P' AND CallInTime >= NOW-30d; avgWaitSeconds = AVG(DATEDIFF(second, CallInTime, NOW))

metrics.definition: Transcription latency distribution using normalized timezone-adjusted minimum latency candidate.
metrics.formula: latencySec = MIN(valid offset-adjusted DATEDIFF(second, CallEndTime, TranscribeDateTime)); report AVG/P25/P50/P75/P90/P95/MAX

metrics.definition: Daily transcription throughput and associated detail volume.
metrics.formula: dailyCalls = COUNT(*) WHERE masterStatus = 'T'; dailyClaims = SUM(detailCount per call)

metrics.definition: Peak and hourly concurrent call volume by date-hour buckets.
metrics.formula: concurrent = COUNT(outboundmaster_detail.ID) GROUP BY CAST(CallDate AS DATE), DATEPART(HOUR, CallInTime)

metrics.definition: System error rate using error-like statuses F, G, E, R.
